articles.title: Envestnet Portfolio Solutions Inc. Acquires 21,594 Shares of The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: Envestnet Portfolio Solutions Inc. increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) by 38.5% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 21,594 shares to hold a total of 77,741 shares valued at $8.85 million. Other institutional investors also modified their holdings, reflecting strong overall institutional interest with hedge funds and institutions owning 65.71% of the stock. Analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Disney with a consensus price target of $134.47, following the company's recent earnings beat of $1.57 EPS on $25.17 billion in revenue.

articles.title: Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management Co. Cuts Position in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management Co. significantly reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 52.5% in the fourth quarter, selling over 151,000 shares. Despite this, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Disney, with an average price target of $134.47, following recent upgrades and a better-than-expected earnings report. The article also touches upon positive park developments and ongoing legal risks related to a facial-recognition lawsuit.
